communications.subject: Tennessee Public Records Act Request: Tennessee HHS response refile
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

Communications and correspondence with the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services regarding the Aug. 26, 2025, HHS letter requesting the Tennessee Department of Children's Services remove content from the state's Personal Responsibility Education Program curricula and program materials. For reference, the letter can be found here: https://acf.gov/sites/default/files/documents/main/08.26.25-Combined-PREP-Letters.pdf.

I also request communications to or from Tennessee Department of Children's Services employees from Aug. 26, 2025, to date of search containing any of the following keywords: "PREP", "Personal Responsibility Education Program", "ACF", "Administration for Children and Families", "Teen Outreach Program", "TOP", and "Manhood 2.0".  

If the PREP curricula changes were made, I request a copy of the material before it was changed as well as a copy of the material after it was changed.

I additionally request that, if possible, fees be waived as I believe this request is in the public interest. The requested documents will be made available to the general public free of charge as part of the public information service at MuckRock.com, processed by a representative of the news media/press and is made in the process of news gathering and not for commercial usage.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Ileana Garnand.

title: Privacy Act and FOIA Request — All Records, Recordings, and Transcripts Pertaining to Ido Samuelson (Central Intelligence Agency)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I hereby request, pursuant to the Freedom of Information 
Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, and the Privacy Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552a, 
all records, files, documents, communications, assessments, 
reports, and information of any kind referencing or relating 
to me:

Full Legal Name: Ido Samuelson
Current Address: 1811 S Quebec Way, Apt #217, 
Denver, Colorado 80231

This request includes but is not limited to:

1. All records, files, and documents of any kind 
referencing my name, identity, or activities

2. All audio recordings, video recordings, and 
transcripts of any kind in which I appear, 
am referenced, or am a subject

3. All surveillance records, monitoring logs, and 
contact reports referencing me

4. All intelligence assessments, threat assessments, 
and security evaluations referencing me

5. All interagency communications referencing me

6. All records related to any contact, outreach, or 
communication between any employee, contractor, 
or agent of this agency and me

7. All records related to any coordination with 
private employers, contractors, or other government 
agencies regarding me or my employment

8. All records related to my employment at or 
contracting with any entity including but not 
limited to: Aptiv PLC, 4D Security Solutions Inc., 
mPrest Systems Ltd., EPAM Systems Inc., and Jet.com

9. All records held in any system of records, 
intelligence databases, security assessment 
databases, or contact logs containing my name 
or identifying information

10. All records related to any threat assessments, 
designations, or classifications applied to me 
by this agency or shared with this agency by 
any other government agency or private entity

This request covers all records regardless of format, 
classification level, or storage medium, including 
but not limited to: paper documents, electronic files, 
audio recordings, video recordings, transcripts, 
emails, memoranda, reports, and databases.

Date range: January 1, 2004 to present.

If any records are withheld in whole or in part, 
please identify the specific exemption claimed for 
each withholding and provide all reasonably 
segregable non-exempt information. Please also 
provide a Vaughn index identifying each withheld 
document and the specific exemption claimed.

I request a complete fee waiver on the following 
grounds:

1. Disclosure is in the public interest and will 
contribute significantly to public understanding 
of government operations and activities

2. I am the subject of the records requested 
under the Privacy Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552a

3. I am a federal whistleblower in active litigation 
in the United States District Court for the 
District of Colorado, Case No. 
1:25-cv-01327-PAB-TPO

Please respond within 20 business days as required 
by statute. If this request is denied in whole or 
in part, I reserve the right to appeal.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ido Samuelson

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ido Samuelson

title: Privacy Act and FOIA Request — All Records, Recordings, and Transcripts Pertaining to Ido Samuelson (Office of Special Counsel)

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

I hereby request, pursuant to the Freedom of Information 
Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, and the Privacy Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552a, 
all records, files, documents, communications, assessments, 
reports, and information of any kind referencing or relating 
to me:

Full Legal Name: Ido Samuelson
Current Address: 1811 S Quebec Way, Apt #217, 
Denver, Colorado 80231

This request includes but is not limited to:

1. All records, files, and documents of any kind 
referencing my name, identity, or activities

2. All audio recordings, video recordings, and 
transcripts of any kind in which I appear, 
am referenced, or am a subject

3. All surveillance records, monitoring logs, and 
contact reports referencing me

4. All intelligence assessments, threat assessments, 
and security evaluations referencing me

5. All interagency communications referencing me

6. All records related to any contact, outreach, or 
communication between any employee, contractor, 
or agent of this agency and me

7. All records related to any coordination with 
private employers, contractors, or other government 
agencies regarding me or my employment

8. All records related to my employment at or 
contracting with any entity including but not 
limited to: Aptiv PLC, 4D Security Solutions Inc., 
mPrest Systems Ltd., EPAM Systems Inc., and Jet.com

9. All records held in any system of records, 
intelligence databases, security assessment 
databases, or contact logs containing my name 
or identifying information

10. All records related to any threat assessments, 
designations, or classifications applied to me 
by this agency or shared with this agency by 
any other government agency or private entity

This request covers all records regardless of format, 
classification level, or storage medium, including 
but not limited to: paper documents, electronic files, 
audio recordings, video recordings, transcripts, 
emails, memoranda, reports, and databases.

Date range: January 1, 2004 to present.

If any records are withheld in whole or in part, 
please identify the specific exemption claimed for 
each withholding and provide all reasonably 
segregable non-exempt information. Please also 
provide a Vaughn index identifying each withheld 
document and the specific exemption claimed.

I request a complete fee waiver on the following 
grounds:

1. Disclosure is in the public interest and will 
contribute significantly to public understanding 
of government operations and activities

2. I am the subject of the records requested 
under the Privacy Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552a

3. I am a federal whistleblower in active litigation 
in the United States District Court for the 
District of Colorado, Case No. 
1:25-cv-01327-PAB-TPO

Please respond within 20 business days as required 
by statute. If this request is denied in whole or 
in part, I reserve the right to appeal.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Ido Samuelson
